title: February 2
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|February|hide30=yes|hide31=yes}}

'''February 2''' is the 33rd day of the year. There are 332 days remaining (333 in leap years).</noinclude>

*[[1930s#1939|1939]] – [[Jackie Burroughs]] is born.
*[[1940s#1949|1949]] – [[Brent Spiner]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Adam Christopher]] is born.
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 85|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 85]] published.
*[[1995]] – ''[[Ambush at Corellia]]'' published.
*[[1997]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Empire Strikes Back - The Special Edition]]'' published.
*[[1998]] – ''[[X-Wing: Wraith Squadron]]'' published.
*[[1999]] – ''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' published.
*[[2000]] – [[Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire: Evolution (trade paperback)|''Star Wars: Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' trade paperback]] published.
*[[2005]] – [[Obsession 3|''Obsession'' 3]] published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Galactic Force]]'' published.
*2009 – ''[[The Clone Wars: The Dark Side]]'' published.
*2009 – ''[[The Clone Wars: Yoda's Missions]]'' published.
*[[2013]] – "[[The Lawless]]" airs on [[Cartoon Network]].
*[[2015]] – "[[The Price of Power]]" published.
*[[2015]] – "[[Vision of Hope]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2016]] – [[Death Star Battle (book)|''Death Star Battle'']] published.
*2016 – ''[[Rolling with BB-8!]]'' published.
*2016 – [[Star Wars Insider 163|''Star Wars Insider'' 163]] published.
*[[2017]] – [[No Disintegrations (Fantasy Flight Games)|No Disintegrations]] released by [[Fantasy Flight Games]]
*[[2021]] – ''[[The High Republic: Into the Dark]]'' published.
*2021 – [[The High Republic: Into the Dark (audiobook)|''The High Republic: Into the Dark'' audiobook]] published.
*2021 – ''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian - The Art & Imagery Collector's Edition, Volume Two]]'' published.
*2021 – ''[[Explosives, Heavy Weapons, and Power Sources]]'' published in Spain.
*[[2022]] – [[Robert Blalack]] dies.
*2022 – [[The High Republic (2021) 14|''The High Republic'' (2021) 14]] published.
*2022 – [[Crimson Reign 2|''Crimson Reign'' 2]] published.
*2022 – [[Halcyon Legacy 1|''Halcyon Legacy'' 1]] published.
*2022 – "[[Chapter 6: From the Desert Comes a Stranger]]" airs on [[Disney+]]
